---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!--
Start with the "why" — what are you trying to do that's currently
awkward, impossible, or annoying? Describe the use case, not the
implementation.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you like PixelSnitch to behave? What would you see, click, or get? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to solve this. Workarounds you're using today. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This feature works entirely locally (no external servers or APIs required)
- [ ] This feature does not collect telemetry or user data
- [ ] This feature is compatible with X's Terms of Service

<!-- PRs for features that fail any of the above are unlikely to be accepted. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc. -->
